sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n57932" key="klimatiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κλῐμᾰτικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n57932.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">pertaining to</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">κλίμα</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0004.tlg001.perseus-grc1:11" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11</biblScope></bibl></cit>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">διαφοραί</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:300:23" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">300.23</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
